# huggingface-space.md

Create a Hugging Face Space with a simple web demo of the code review API.

## Space Config
- SDK: gradio
- Python version: 3.10
- Space title: my-automaton AI Code Review Demo

## Demo Features
- Paste code in any language
- Click "Review" to call the API
- Display issues, quality score, and severity levels
